items.hostSchool: MEV Koleji Ozel Basinkoy Anadolu Lisesi
items.focus_en: Project launch, shared planning, communication routines, and first classroom activities.
items.focus_tr: Proje baslangici, ortak planlama, iletisim duzeni ve ilk sinif etkinlikleri.

items.focus_en: Intercultural exchange, student collaboration, and applied upcycling workshops.
items.focus_tr: Kulturler arasi degisim, ogrenci is birligi ve uygulamali ileri donusum atolyeleri.

items.focus_en: Technical creativity, reuse culture, product design, and project documentation.
items.focus_tr: Teknik yaraticilik, yeniden kullanim kulturu, urun tasarimi ve proje belgeleme.

items.hostSchool: Zespol Szkol Samochodowych im. Tadeusza Tanskiego
items.focus_en: Final workshops, dissemination practice, evaluation, and legacy planning.
items.focus_tr: Final atolyeler, yayginlastirma uygulamalari, degerlendirme ve kalicilik planlamasi.
